Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.graphics

Class FlixelGraphicWrapperFactory

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.graphics.FlixelGraphicWrapperFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
FlixelWrapperFactory<FlixelGraphic>
public final class FlixelGraphicWrapperFactory extends Object implements FlixelWrapperFactory<FlixelGraphic>
Pooled FlixelGraphic factory for FlixelAssetManager.obtainWrapper(String, Class).
